meaning: adj.不可爱的,讨人嫌的,不漂亮的,丑的
examples: She found a small, inexpensive motel on the outskirts of the town; it was barren and unlovely.
It is not just unlovely, it is actually nasty.
SOLAR power has become an unlovely adolescent.
Tubby and unlovely, with hard wooden seats, the ferry boats have plied these waters since the late 19th century.
Such a society may be unlovely to many people but there is no reason why it cannot reach full employment.
